---
title: "DPCATCH"
subtitle: "SWISS LISA Data Processing Center"
image: foto.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-Mail
      href: mailto:max@uni-beispiel.de
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/maxmuster
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
---

Add text
